segments.original_text: う〜ん展開継続していく

segments.text: Umeki with the Rage, cleanly gets back on stage and chains it up!
segments.original_text: うめきレイジきっちり復帰通して次に繋いでいきます

full_text: The momentum keeps going! There's that defense! Umeki with the Rage, cleanly gets back on stage and chains it up! Nair KO at mid-percent!

corrections.corrected: う〜ん展開継続していく

corrections.original: くぬ中傷でゲイツイから
corrections.rule: smash term (くぬ→空N, ゲイツイ→撃墜)
